source_name: Lowland Introduced Riparian Woodland and Scrub
notes: TAMARIX / RUSSIAN OLIVE — the Stage-2 invasive class. Introduced woody riparian; does not separate saltcedar from Russian olive (that is a later Level-4 split).
Semi-natural; may contain mixed native/non-native stands
Herbaceous wetland — riparian but NOT woody. Excluded from the woody target by our own definition (weak_labels.py); include only if the target is 'riparian_vegetation' broadly.
Ambiguous — may be riparian or upland; low confidence
MAJOR confusion class — irrigated fields are spectrally similar to riparian in the growing season. This is what the weak labels got wrong (~0.00 F1 on the Animas ag valley).
Gravel/sand bars and exposed channel within the corridor
Terrain/canopy shadow — mapping artifact; must be EXCLUDED from training (masked
